reason: Both give the same correct recommendation (don't match; segment and defend selectively; expect competitor's subsidized pricing to be unsustainable; differentiate rather than fight on price) and hit all the key points. Answer A includes a genuinely useful addition tied to the question's stated constraint: explicit fundraising-timing guidance given the 18-month runway (raise by month ~9-12), which is decision-relevant and absent from B. Answer B's unique additions (discount escalation path, stripped-down tier) are more incremental tactical flourishes. A's edge is a small but real advantage in usefulness given the runway detail was explicitly part of the question.
